urdu transliteration text:
Yaad Aati Hay Hume Rukhsat Shahe Dilgir Ki
Khoon Rulati Hay Jahanko Bekasi Shabbir Ki
english translation text:
We Remember The Final Farewell Of The Broken-hearted King
The World Cries Tears Of Blood At The Helplessness Of Shabbir

urdu transliteration text:
Bibiyo Se Sheh Ka Kehna Aakhri Tum Par Salam
Koyi Kya Likhega Halat Khayma-e Shabbir Ki
english translation text:
The Shah Said To The Ladies: "My Final Salam On You"
Who Can Describe The State Of The Camp Of Shabbir?

urdu transliteration text:
Sheh Ne Zainab Se Kaha Bacho Se Rehna Hoshiyar
Aur Hifaazat Karna Khawar Abid-e Dilgir Ki
english translation text:
Said The King Unto Zainab: Take Care Of The Children
And Protect, O Sister, The Broken-hearted Abid

urdu transliteration text:
Bache Gar Marjaye Phir Bhi Badua Karna Na Tum
Yeh Wasiyat Bibiyon Se Thi Shahe Dilgir Ki
english translation text:
And Do Not Wish The People Any Ill, Even If The Children Die
This Was The Will Of The Broken-hearted Shah To The Ladies

urdu transliteration text:
Sheh Ne Asrare Imamat Kar Ke Abid Ko Supurd
Phir Khabar Di Bibiyo Ki Kayd Ki Zanjir Ki
english translation text:
Handing Over The Secrets Of Imamate To Abid, The Shah
Gave The Ladies Tidings Of Imprisonment And Chains

urdu transliteration text:
Bole sheh kehna mere shiyo se pohcha kar salaam
Kash! Tum bhi dekhte halat mere beshir ki
english translation text:
Said the King: Give Salam to my Shias and tell them
O would you have seen the state of my infant child!

urdu transliteration text:
Shah Ne Pehna Libas-e-kohna Kar Ke Kartar
Hona Uryan Lash Ye Thi Aarzo Shabbir Ki
english translation text:
The King Then Wore A Dress, Torn And Slashed
To Be An Unrecognizable Corpse Was The Wish Of Shabbir

urdu transliteration text:
Bachi Ghode Ke Kadam Se Lipti Sheh Ronay Lagay
A Little Girl Curled Around The Horse's Hooves
Sine Per Kuch Der Soyi Ladli Shabbir Ki
english translation text: And On His Chest She Lay A While, The Beloved Of Shabbir

urdu transliteration text:
Khoon Rulati Hai Jahan Ko Bekasi Shabbir Ki
Yaad Aati Hay Hame Rukhsat Shahe Dilgir Ki
english translation text:
We Remember The Final Farewell Of The Broken-hearted King
The World Cries Tears Of Blood At The Helplessness Of Shabbir
